economic_notes: Nation operates Club SAPP and The Loonie Bin Gaming Lounge with VLT commitments of $168,532 annually. Petro Gas Bar is a consolidated entity. Investments in Aseneskak Casino Limited Partnership and Mahihkan Bus Lines LP accounted for by modified equity method. Economic development start-up loans to members totalling $109,893.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2023. Nation is in Manitoba. Net debt position of $9,852,893. Large 'Other revenue' of $23,986,301 and 'Other expenses' of $16,231,705 versus prior year $5,830,410 suggest significant non-recurring or unusual activity in the 'Other' category. Community development expenses dropped dramatically from $10,126,861 to $6,107,266 while Other expenses tripled. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $19,111,877 + Health Canada $4,346,314 + Federal MKO $595,426 + Province of Manitoba $1,177,636 + CMHC $558,178 = $25,789,431 (rounded to $25,789,305 based on net transfer adjustment). No schedule of remuneration included in provided text. Consolidation includes 10 fully consolidated entities and 2 GBEs on modified equity basis. Contingent liability of $265,155 related to ISC social services funding recoveries.
